plan_analysis:
The pre-research material only gives generic background on the two indices; it does not supply (a) the historical distribution of NQ-minus-ES total-return spreads over comparable two-week windows, (b) quantitative information on how large the spread has been recently, (c) key upcoming catalysts during 16-27 Mar 2026 that could swing the spread, or (d) any counter-narrative evidence for ES outperformance.  

A well-prepared forecaster therefore needs:
• Base-rate numbers: how often and by how much NQ beats (or trails) ES over 10-11 trading-day spans; mean, st-dev, and percentiles of the spread.  
• Mechanical clarity: confirmation of the exact Yahoo Finance tickers, trading-day schedule around 16 Mar and 27 Mar, and any half-days that could affect P₀/P₁ selection.  
• Current market state: the most recent NQ and ES close prices, the YTD spread, volatility, and positioning.  
• Key drivers through 27 Mar: scheduled macro events (FOMC, CPI, PCE, durable goods), large-cap tech news (earnings pre-announcements, regulation, guidance), and sentiment shifts (sector rotation into value/financials).  
• Contrarian evidence: reasons the broader S&P could outperform (e.g., bank or energy rallies, tech pull-backs, higher rates hurting growth stocks).

The eight queries below are designed to surface datasets, statistics, upcoming catalysts, and relevant news flow that collectively cover those information gaps.

queries_planned.query: NQ vs ES futures spread history
queries_planned.intent: find long-run charts or datasets showing the return differential between Nasdaq-100 and S&P 500 futures.
obtain statistics or blog posts that calculate how frequently Nasdaq beats the S&P in rolling bi-weekly returns.

queries_planned.query: Over last 15 years, calculate every 10-trading-day total-return difference between CME NQ and ES futures; provide mean, median, stdev, 25th/75th percentiles, and share of periods where spread <0. Also list top five positive and negative outliers.
queries_planned.intent: generate a quantitative base-rate distribution and extreme-case examples for the spread.
pull the latest Nasdaq-100 futures price history to compute recent returns and volatility.
pull the latest S&P 500 futures price history to compute recent returns and volatility.
identify macro events scheduled between 16 Mar and 27 Mar 2026 that could drive index moves.

queries_planned.query: Tech sector rotation early 2026 value stocks
queries_planned.intent: surface news or analysis discussing a potential shift out of tech into other sectors, a key contrarian factor.
get up-to-date commentary and numbers on how much Nasdaq has already out-/under-performed the S&P this year.
